DP.442.0000:
The reservations were full up,
but they managed to get us in here.\f
We’re finally alone, the two of us,
if you’d leave, that is.\f
This is something we don’t need
anymore. Will you take it?\f
DP.442.0001:
I’ve always relied on the old
Coin Toss to make any decision.
DP.442.0002:
That Coin Toss is why we ended up in
this musty, old, and stinky suite...
DP.442.0003:
We wanted to be together alone so
we could talk without being disturbed.\f
We really need this time together,
just the two of us.
